name: Flickerfield Operative
reasoning: V3 best matches the prompt's core requirements: it depicts a lean, nimble rogue in a dynamic mid-stride crouch through a crystalline, fractured corridor with strong geometric composition. The character has sharp features, focused expression, and outstretched hands toward arcane energy. V1 shows a wide-legged stance that reads more as a power pose than nimble mid-stride movement, and the hands lack the "outstretched toward swirling motes" quality. V2 has a weapon (sword) not mentioned in the prompt and a less dynamic pose. V3 excels in prompt adherence, composition clarity for card size, cool steel-blue/teal palette, and screen-glow lighting throughout the crystalline corridor.

artifacts_found.issue: Wide-legged stance contradicts 'mid-stride' movement; less nimble appearance
Includes weapon (sword) not in prompt; less dynamic pose; watermark visible in lower left
